name: Ensalada Con Quinoa De Peru
recipeIngredient: 2 Aji chiles, fresh, stems removed and seeds removed, chopped fine
2 medium Cucumbers, peeled, seeded, cut into 1/2 inch cubes
8 Green Onions, white part only, thinly sliced
Salt and Black Pepper to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Rinse the quinoa under cold running water until the water runs clear.
2. Combine the quinoa with 1.5 quarts water in a saucepan. Bring to a boil, then reduce heat and simmer for 10 minutes, or until all grains are translucent.
3. Drain the quinoa and transfer it to a bowl. Chill.
4. Whisk together lime juice, chopped Aji chiles, and olive oil in a separate bowl.
5. In a large bowl, combine chilled quinoa, cucumbers, tomato, green onions, parsley, and mint. Pour the lime juice mixture over the top and toss gently.
6. Season with salt and freshly ground black pepper to taste.
7. To serve, place a mound of shredded Bibb lettuce on individual plates and garnish with hard-boiled egg slices, corn rounds, and black olives.
